title: Implied Volatility Skew Signal (yfinance Options Chain)
summary: Extract put-call implied volatility skew from yfinance option chains — the difference between OTM put IV and ATM call IV — as a daily signal dimension for optionable stocks. A 2024 Management Science paper (Wu & Tian) confirms IV skew reflects both structural risk characteristics and short-term informed order flow, making it predictive of next-period returns. yfinance exposes full option chains with implied volatility natively, making this free to implement.
expected_impact: Academic studies document 0.5% lower next-month returns per unit increase in RVol-IVol spread; IV skew is a statistically significant cross-sectional return predictor after controlling for momentum, size, and value (Management Science 2024). Expected directional accuracy uplift of +3-5% on optionable stocks.
